rulings.Case Title: IN RE: 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 28, 2020 line 1. PETITIONER 1034 FILBERT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION's Notice of Hearing On Petition Hearing Required to address notice to lenders, reasonableness of removing "negligence" provision, and reasonableness of changing capital improvement approval from 100% to 80%. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY Z DILLEY ET AL VS. BURRADELL CONSTRUCTION INC. A CALIFORNIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Good Faith Determination Of Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 28, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANTs CHRISTOPHER MCMAHON, and MCMAHON ARCHITECTS, INC.'s Motion For Good Faith Determination Of Settlement DENIED without prejudice. While the moving party correctly cites authorities regarding factors to be considered, including. "a rough approximation of plaintiff's total recovery," "settlor's proportional liability" and recognition that settlor should pay less "than his proportionate share of the anticipated damages," moving papers contain no discussion of the approximate total recovery or the anticipated damages. Arguments and evidence introduced in reply will not be considered. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Defendant Leave To File A Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 28, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT SUZANNE ROMAINE's Motion For Order Granting Defendant Leave To File A Cross-Complaint Hearing Required to address defendant's good faith. Specifically, moving party failed to show that failure to bring cross-complaint was in good faith. While defendant's new counsel satisfactorily states that her failure to bring the cross-complaint earlier was in good faith, there is no such showing by the defendants herself. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL L'ABBE VS. AERON NOWELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Plaintiff Daniel Labbe To Compel Defendant Aeron Nowell To Respond To Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 28, 2020 line 4. PLAINTIFF DANIEL L'ABBE's Motion To Compel Defendant Aeron Nowell To Respond To Discovery OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Additionally, default against Defendant Aeron Nowell entered on January 8, 2020. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD ROBIN ET AL VS. SOTHEBY'S INTERNATIONAL REALTY, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Complaint And Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 28, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT REBECCA SCHUMACHER's Motion To Consolidate Complaint And Arbitration DENIED without prejudice. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANSHU ARYA VS. MAX RUIZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 28, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANTs MAX RUIZ, and MERCEDES RUIZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to March 12, 2020 per the Order of the presiding judge. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: XIU XUE LIAO VS. WILLIAM R CHASTAIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 28, 2020 line 7. DEFENDANTs WILLIAM CHASTAIN, and LAICE SOUZA VALE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to March 4, 2020 for the opposing party to provide a courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copy to be delivered to Department 501 no later than February 28, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)
